hub.fcttemplate_desc.tr: Functional Communication Training planning ជាមួយ modality selection

hub.replacebehavior_desc.tr: Map អាកប្បកិរិយា នៃ concern ទៅ functionally សមមូល replacements ជាមួយ teaching យុទ្ធសាស្ត្រ

hub.restorative_desc.tr: step-by-step scripts សម្រាប់ harm repair, community រង្វង់, និង reintegration conferences

hub.scdmanager_desc.tr: AB, ABAB, ច្រើន Baseline, Alternating Treatments, Changing Criterion

hub.sessionnotes_desc.tr: Timestamped ការសង្កេត កំណត់ចំណាំ ជាមួយ សំឡេង dictation — capture បរិបទ as it happens

hub.sessiontracker_desc.tr: Systematic វគ្គ-ផ្អែកលើ behavioral measurement ជាមួយ rate calculation

hub.socialvalidity_desc.tr: TARF និង IRP-15 scales សម្រាប់ measuring treatment acceptability — ត្រូវការ សម្រាប់ publication

hub.taskanalysis_desc.tr: Break ជំនាញ ចូលទៅ teachable ជំហាន ជាមួយ forward, backward, ឬ total-task chaining និង prompt តាមដាន

hub.teamnotes_desc.tr: Multi-role timestamped collaboration thread សម្រាប់ គ្រូ, paras, counselors, និង ឪពុកម្តាយ

hub.treatintegrity_desc.en: Document whether interventions are implemented as designed — component-level fidelity tracking
hub.treatintegrity_desc.tr: ឯកសារ whether អន្តរាគមន៍ គឺ implemented as designed — សមាសភាគ-កម្រិត fidelity តាមដាន

hub.cantdowontdo_desc.en: Sort skill vs. performance deficits to pick the right support.
hub.cantdowontdo_desc.tr: តម្រៀប ជំនាញ vs. performance deficits ទៅ pick ត្រឹមត្រូវ ការគាំទ្រ.

hub.competingpathways_desc.en: Map desired and replacement behaviors against the problem path.
hub.competingpathways_desc.tr: Map desired និង replacement អាកប្បកិរិយា against problem path.

hub.functionquiz_desc.en: Practice identifying behavior function from short scenarios.
hub.functionquiz_desc.tr: អនុវត្ត identifying អាកប្បកិរិយា function ពី ខ្លី scenarios.

hub.mipractice_title.tr: Motivational Interviewing អនុវត្ត

hub.mipractice_desc.en: Rehearse MI conversations with simulated student responses.
hub.mipractice_desc.tr: Rehearse MI conversations ជាមួយ simulated សិស្ស responses.

hub.practicum_desc.en: Run a guided practice case from start to finish.
hub.practicum_desc.tr: ដំណើរការ guided អនុវត្ត case ពី ចាប់ផ្តើម ទៅ finish.

abc.analysis_failed.tr: ការវិភាគ failed — សាកល្បង again

abc.setting_placeholder.tr: e.g., ថ្នាក់រៀន, Hallway, Cafeteria

overview.empty_desc.en: Start collecting ABC data or run live observations to see trends here.
overview.empty_desc.tr: ចាប់ផ្តើម collecting ABC ទិន្នន័យ ឬ ដំណើរការ បន្តផ្ទាល់ ការសង្កេត ទៅ មើល trends here.

token.target_placeholder.tr: e.g., Raise hand មុន speaking

hotspot.tap_hint.en: Tap a cell to increment. Click routine name to edit.
hotspot.tap_hint.tr: Tap ក្រឡា ទៅ increment. ចុច routine name ទៅ កែសម្រួល.

no_entries_match.tr: ទេ entries ផ្គូផ្គង របស់អ្នក filters

quick_fill_hint.en: AI will parse your description into the fields below. You can then edit manually.
quick_fill_hint.tr: AI នឹង parse របស់អ្នក description ចូលទៅ fields below. អ្នក អាច បន្ទាប់មក កែសម្រួល ដោយដៃ.

restorative_title.tr: 💬 Restorative ការសន្ទនា Starters

quiz_fba_purpose.en: What is the primary purpose of an FBA?
quiz_fba_purpose.tr: អ្វី គឺ primary purpose នៃ FBA?

quick_fill_placeholder.en: e.g. "Student threw paper during math when asked to show work, teacher redirected calmly"
quick_fill_placeholder.tr: e.g. "សិស្ស threw paper ក្នុងអំឡុង គណិត ពេល asked ទៅ បង្ហាញ ការងារ, គ្រូ redirected calmly"

nl_edit_placeholder.tr: e.g. "ផ្លាស់ប្តូរ consequence ទៅ គ្រូ redirected"

reinforce_step_1.en: Start with dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 or FR-2)
reinforce_step_1.tr: ចាប់ផ្តើម ជាមួយ dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 ឬ FR-2)

reinforce_step_2.en: Once behavior is consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2
reinforce_step_2.tr: Once អាកប្បកិរិយា គឺ consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2

reinforce_step_3.en: Move to variable schedule (VR) for more natural maintenance
reinforce_step_3.tr: ផ្លាស់ទី ទៅ អថេរ schedule (VR) សម្រាប់ ច្រើនទៀត natural maintenance

reinforce_step_4.en: Gradually increase VR value (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)
reinforce_step_4.tr: Gradually increase VR តម្លៃ (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)

fidelity_tip_1.tr: ពិនិត្យឡើងវិញ implementation procedures ជាមួយ staff

fidelity_tip_2.tr: Provide additional BST (Behavioral ជំនាញ Training)

fidelity_tip_3.tr: Simplify procedures ប្រសិនបើ too ស្មុគស្មាញ

fidelity_tip_4.tr: ពិចារណា environmental barriers ទៅ implementation

record_tip_4.tr: ប្រើ ជាក់លាក់, observable descriptions

quiz_opt_any_stops.en: Any behavior that stops the problem
quiz_opt_any_stops.tr: ណាមួយ អាកប្បកិរិយា នោះ stops problem

ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space.en: A break? Help? Someone to listen? Space?
ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space.tr: break? ជំនួយ? Someone ទៅ ស្តាប់? Space?

ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c.en: Add context, constraints, or specific challenges... e.g., "The student also has a speech delay" or "This is a middle school student"
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c.tr: បន្ថែម បរិបទ, constraints, ឬ ជាក់លាក់ បញ្ហាប្រឈម... e.g., " សិស្ស also has speech delay" ឬ "នេះ គឺ middle សាលា សិស្ស"

ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun.en: Any other details (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...
ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun.tr: ណាមួយ ផ្សេងទៀត លម្អិត (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...

ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra.en: Describe the scenario you want to practice with...
ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra.tr: Describe scenario អ្នក ចង់ ទៅ អនុវត្ត ជាមួយ...

ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a.en: Describe the student persona... e.g., "You are a 3rd grader who becomes anxious during math and tends to cry and shut down..."
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a.tr: Describe សិស្ស persona... e.g., "អ្នក គឺ 3rd grader who becomes anxious ក្នុងអំឡុង គណិត និង tends ទៅ cry និង shut down..."

ph.describe_what_your_child_did.tr: Describe អ្វី របស់អ្នក child did...

ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.en: e.g. "Does a token economy reduce off-task behavior during math instruction?"
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.tr: e.g. "Does token economy reduce off-task អាកប្បកិរិយា ក្នុងអំឡុង គណិត ការណែនាំ?"

ph.eg_hitting_peers_when_frustrated.tr: e.g. Hitting peers ពេល frustrated

ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_.en: e.g., "Student is defiant and refuses to follow directions."
ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_.tr: e.g., "សិស្ស គឺ defiant និង refuses ទៅ follow directions."

ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.en: e.g. "student with autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "new to the school"
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.tr: e.g. "សិស្ស ជាមួយ autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "ថ្មី ទៅ សាលា"

ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg.en: Enter the behavioral goal to scale (e.g., "Student will remain in seat during independent work for 15 minutes")
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg.tr: បញ្ចូល behavioral គោលដៅ ទៅ scale (e.g., "សិស្ស នឹង remain ក្នុង seat ក្នុងអំឡុង independent ការងារ សម្រាប់ 15 minutes")

ph.followup_needed_optional.tr: Follow-up needed? (ស្រេចចិត្ត)

ph.items_separated_by_semicolons.tr: ធាតុ separated by semicolons

ph.outcome_key_takeaways_optional.tr: Outcome / គន្លឹះ takeaways (ស្រេចចិត្ត)

ph.rationale_which_antecedent_does_this_.tr: Rationale (which antecedent does នេះ address?)

ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked.en:
Reflect on your approach...
• What worked well?
• What would you do differently?
• What strategies do you want to practice next?
ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked.tr:
Reflect លើ របស់អ្នក approach...
• អ្វី worked well?
• អ្វី would អ្នក do differently?
• អ្វី យុទ្ធសាស្ត្រ do អ្នក ចង់ ទៅ អនុវត្ត បន្ទាប់?

ph.replacement_behavior_functionally_equ.tr: ✅ Replacement អាកប្បកិរិយា (functionally សមមូល)

ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt.en: Share what you notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural context, or suggestions for the school team...
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt.tr: ចែករំលែក អ្វី អ្នក notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural បរិបទ, ឬ suggestions សម្រាប់ សាលា ក្រុម...

ph.topic_purpose_of_contact.tr: ប្រធានបទ / purpose នៃ contact

ph.type_language_eg_spanish_arabic_somal.tr: ប្រភេទ ភាសា (e.g., Spanish, Arabic, Somali)

ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a.en: Type your response here. Be thorough and use professional language...
ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a.tr: ប្រភេទ របស់អ្នក ការឆ្លើយតប here. Be thorough និង ប្រើ professional ភាសា...

ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ.en: What could you or a grown-up do differently?
ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ.tr: អ្វី could អ្នក ឬ grown-up do differently?

ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional.en: What made you feel this way? (optional)
ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional.tr: អ្វី made អ្នក feel នេះ way? (ស្រេចចិត្ត)

ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi.en: What was going on before you felt this way?
ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi.tr: អ្វី was going លើ មុន អ្នក felt នេះ way?

toast.added_n_entries_to_abc_data.en: Added N entries to ABC data!
toast.added_n_entries_to_abc_data.tr: Added N entries ទៅ ABC ទិន្នន័យ!

toast.ai_suggestion_failed_try_again.tr: AI suggestion failed — សាកល្បង again

toast.all_entries_already_synced_to_abc_.en: All entries already synced to ABC data
toast.all_entries_already_synced_to_abc_.tr: ទាំងអស់ entries already synced ទៅ ABC ទិន្នន័យ

toast.autofilled_n_baseline_n_interventi.en: Auto-filled: N baseline + N intervention points from "N"
toast.autofilled_n_baseline_n_interventi.tr: Auto-filled: N baseline + N អន្តរាគមន៍ ចំណុច ពី "N"

toast.behavior_occurred_dro_timer_reset.tr: ⚠️ អាកប្បកិរិយា occurred — DRO timer កំណត់ឡើងវិញ

toast.case_study_complete_review_your_de.en: Case study complete! Review your debrief.
toast.case_study_complete_review_your_de.tr: Case study បញ្ចប់! ពិនិត្យឡើងវិញ របស់អ្នក debrief.

toast.case_study_generated_begin_phase_1.tr: Case study បានបង្កើត! Begin Phase 1.

toast.data_loaded_from_cloud.tr: ☁️ ទិន្នន័យ loaded ពី cloud

toast.dro_interval_complete_reinforce_no.en: 🎉 DRO interval complete — REINFORCE! No target behavior occurred!
toast.dro_interval_complete_reinforce_no.tr: 🎉 DRO interval បញ្ចប់ — REINFORCE! ទេ គោលដៅ អាកប្បកិរិយា occurred!

toast.each_phase_needs_at_least_2_data_p.en: Each phase needs at least 2 data points
toast.each_phase_needs_at_least_2_data_p.tr: នីមួយៗ phase needs at least 2 ទិន្នន័យ ចំណុច

toast.effect_sizes_attached_to_iep_prep.en: Effect sizes attached to IEP Prep!
toast.effect_sizes_attached_to_iep_prep.tr: Effect sizes attached ទៅ IEP Prep!

toast.evaluation_failed_try_again.tr: Evaluation failed. សាកល្បង again.

toast.failed_to_generate_case_study_try_.tr: Failed ទៅ បង្កើត case study. សាកល្បង again.

toast.failed_to_generate_comparison.tr: Failed ទៅ បង្កើត comparison

toast.failed_to_generate_share_code.tr: Failed ទៅ បង្កើត ចែករំលែក code

toast.failed_to_parse_snapshot_file.tr: Failed ទៅ parse snapshot ឯកសារ

toast.family_voice_entry_added.tr: Family សំឡេង entry added ✨

toast.graph_data_ready_autofill_availabl.en: Graph data ready — auto-fill available in Effect Size!

toast.mastered_n_n_consecutive_sessions_.tr: 🎉 MASTERED! N — N consecutive វគ្គ at criterion!

toast.name_at_least_one_target_behavior.en: Name at least one target behavior
toast.name_at_least_one_target_behavior.tr: Name at least one គោលដៅ អាកប្បកិរិយា

toast.need_at_least_2_data_points_per_ph.tr: ត្រូវការ at least 2 ទិន្នន័យ ចំណុច per phase

toast.need_at_least_2_phases_in_the_grap.tr: ត្រូវការ at least 2 phases ក្នុង ក្រាហ្វ (baseline + អន្តរាគមន៍)

toast.no_valid_data_found_in_csv.en: No valid data found in CSV
toast.no_valid_data_found_in_csv.tr: ទេ valid ទិន្នន័យ found ក្នុង CSV

toast.not_a_valid_alloflow_snapshot_file.en: Not a valid AlloFlow snapshot file
toast.not_a_valid_alloflow_snapshot_file.tr: មិន valid AlloFlow snapshot ឯកសារ

toast.parsed_n_abc_entries_from_transcri.tr: Parsed N ABC entries ពី transcript!

toast.popups_blocked_downloaded_as_html_.tr: Pop-ups blocked — downloaded as HTML ឯកសារ instead.

toast.quick_fill_n_items_loaded.tr: លឿន Fill: N ធាតុ loaded ⚡

toast.rate_at_least_one_item_first.en: Rate at least one item first
toast.rate_at_least_one_item_first.tr: Rate at least one ធាតុ ដំបូង

toast.reflection_analysis_ready.tr: Reflection ការវិភាគ ready 🌟

toast.reframed_through_strengths_lens.tr: Reframed តាមរយៈ strengths lens ✨

toast.review_failed_try_again.tr: ពិនិត្យឡើងវិញ failed — សាកល្បង again

toast.session_saved_ns_n_total_responses.tr: វគ្គ បានរក្សាទុក! Ns, N total responses

toast.share_code_copied_to_clipboard.tr: ចែករំលែក code copied ទៅ clipboard!

toast.simulation_started_you_are_now_the.tr: ការក្លែងធ្វើ started — អ្នក គឺ ឥឡូវ counselor 🎭

toast.speech_recognition_not_supported_i.tr: Speech recognition មិន supported ក្នុង នេះ browser

toast.switched_to_n_no_data_loaded.tr: Switched ទៅ N (no ទិន្នន័យ loaded)

toast.traffic_light_generated.tr: Traffic light បានបង្កើត ✨

toast.workspace_loaded_n_entries_n_notes.tr: Workspace loaded (N entries, N កំណត់ចំណាំ) 📂

toast.need_2_baseline_2_intervention_ent.en: Need at least 2 baseline and 2 intervention entries with phase tags.
toast.need_2_baseline_2_intervention_ent.tr: ត្រូវការ at least 2 baseline និង 2 អន្តរាគមន៍ entries ជាមួយ phase tags.

ui.add_abc_entries_to_see_visual_trend_d.en: Add ABC entries to see visual trend data.
ui.add_abc_entries_to_see_visual_trend_d.tr: បន្ថែម ABC entries ទៅ មើល រូបភាព trend ទិន្នន័យ.

ui.add_connections_to_build_the_relation.en: Add connections to build the relationship map.
ui.add_connections_to_build_the_relation.tr: បន្ថែម connections ទៅ សាង relationship map.

ui.ai_is_analyzing_your_transcript.tr: AI គឺ analyzing របស់អ្នក transcript...

ui.aigenerated_meeting_preparation_packe.en: AI-generated meeting preparation packet from your behavioral data
ui.aigenerated_meeting_preparation_packe.tr: AI-generated meeting preparation packet ពី របស់អ្នក behavioral ទិន្នន័យ

ui.aipowered_pattern_analysis_with_proac.en: AI-powered pattern analysis with proactive prevention strategies
ui.aipowered_pattern_analysis_with_proac.tr: AI-powered pattern ការវិភាគ ជាមួយ proactive prevention យុទ្ធសាស្ត្រ

ui.aisynthesized_behavioral_profile_from.en: AI-synthesized behavioral profile from all data sources
ui.aisynthesized_behavioral_profile_from.tr: AI-synthesized behavioral profile ពី ទាំងអស់ ទិន្នន័យ sources

ui.avoid_these_frequently_seen_errors_to.en: Avoid these frequently seen errors to improve behavioral outcomes.
ui.avoid_these_frequently_seen_errors_to.tr: Avoid these frequently seen កំហុស ទៅ improve behavioral outcomes.

ui.based_on_horner_salentine_albin_2003.tr: ផ្អែកលើ លើ Horner, Salentine, & Albin (2003)

ui.break_skills_into_teachable_steps_wit.en: Break skills into teachable steps with chaining and prompt tracking
ui.break_skills_into_teachable_steps_wit.tr: Break ជំនាញ ចូលទៅ teachable ជំហាន ជាមួយ chaining និង prompt តាមដាន

ui.calculate_tauu_nap_and_pnd_to_quantif.en: Calculate Tau-U, NAP, and PND to quantify intervention effectiveness.
ui.calculate_tauu_nap_and_pnd_to_quantif.tr: គណនា Tau-U, NAP, និង PND ទៅ quantify អន្តរាគមន៍ effectiveness.

ui.choose_the_right_differential_reinfor.en: Choose the right differential reinforcement strategy
ui.choose_the_right_differential_reinfor.tr: ជ្រើសរើស ត្រឹមត្រូវ differential reinforcement យុទ្ធសាស្ត្រ

ui.collect_some_abc_data_first_to_genera.en: Collect some ABC data first to generate a meaningful packet.
ui.collect_some_abc_data_first_to_genera.tr: Collect មួយចំនួន ABC ទិន្នន័យ ដំបូង ទៅ បង្កើត meaningful packet.

ui.crf_every_time_fr2_fr3_fr5_vr5_vr8_na.en: CRF (every time) → FR-2 → FR-3 → FR-5 → VR-5 → VR-8 → Natural reinforcement
ui.crf_every_time_fr2_fr3_fr5_vr5_vr8_na.tr: CRF (every ពេលវេលា) → FR-2 → FR-3 → FR-5 → VR-5 → VR-8 → Natural reinforcement

ui.describe_your_research_question_and_l.en: Describe your research question and let AI recommend the best design.
ui.describe_your_research_question_and_l.tr: Describe របស់អ្នក research សំណួរ និង let AI recommend ល្អបំផុត design.

ui.discrete_trial_training_with_mastery_.en: Discrete Trial Training with mastery tracking and auto-advance
ui.discrete_trial_training_with_mastery_.tr: Discrete Trial Training ជាមួយ mastery តាមដាន និង auto-advance

ui.document_whether_interventions_are_im.en: Document whether interventions are implemented as designed
ui.document_whether_interventions_are_im.tr: ឯកសារ whether អន្តរាគមន៍ គឺ implemented as designed

ui.drop_a_snapshot_file_here.tr: ទម្លាក់ Snapshot ឯកសារ Here

ui.enter_data_or_record_sessions_to_gene.en: Enter data or record sessions to generate a cumulative record.
ui.enter_data_or_record_sessions_to_gene.tr: បញ្ចូល ទិន្នន័យ ឬ record វគ្គ ទៅ បង្កើត cumulative record.

ui.family_voices_are_powerful_share_your.en: Family voices are powerful. Share your first observation!
ui.family_voices_are_powerful_share_your.tr: Family voices គឺ powerful. ចែករំលែក របស់អ្នក ដំបូង ការសង្កេត!

ui.functional_communication_training_pla.tr: Functional Communication Training planning ឧបករណ៍

ui.generate_a_unique_scenario_tailored_t.en: Generate a unique scenario tailored to your training needs.
ui.generate_a_unique_scenario_tailored_t.tr: បង្កើត unique scenario tailored ទៅ របស់អ្នក training needs.

ui.generate_iepready_progress_monitoring.en: Generate IEP-ready progress monitoring paragraphs from your accumulated behavioral data.
ui.generate_iepready_progress_monitoring.tr: បង្កើត IEP-ready វឌ្ឍនភាព monitoring កថាខណ្ឌ ពី របស់អ្នក accumulated behavioral ទិន្នន័យ.

ui.generate_tailored_recommendations_bas.en: Generate tailored recommendations based on the behavioral data and selected audience.
ui.generate_tailored_recommendations_bas.tr: បង្កើត tailored recommendations ផ្អែកលើ លើ behavioral ទិន្នន័យ និង បានជ្រើសរើស audience.

ui.gently_surfaces_patterns_for_reflecti.en: Gently surfaces patterns for reflection — growth, not guilt
ui.gently_surfaces_patterns_for_reflecti.tr: Gently surfaces លំនាំ សម្រាប់ ការឆ្លុះបញ្ចាំង — growth, មិន guilt

ui.get_ai_coaching_on_data_collection_qu.en: Get AI coaching on data collection quality. Identifies gaps, suggests improvements, rates your data.
